## Mockup / Reference

## Definition of Done

<!-- Disesuaikan dengan epic ini. Mengacu ke docs/qa/DEFINITION-OF-DONE.md Level 3. -->

- [ ] Spec disetujui Product Owner
- [ ] Implementation done
- [ ] Unit + integration test ≥ coverage target
- [ ] E2E happy path Playwright pass
- [ ] Accessibility audit clean (axe critical = 0)
- [ ] Performance baseline tidak regress
- [ ] Docs user-facing di-update
- [ ] Telemetri / analytics events di-instrument
